name: AutoVSR: Automatic Visual-to-Symbolic Reasoning for Symbolic Expression Generation from Circuit Schematic

description: arXiv:2607.11338v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Symbolic expressions can effectively characterize and predict circuit behavior, but deriving them directly from circuit schematics is challenging. This process requires accurate visual-to-symbolic construction of circuit structure from images and correct multi-step symbolic derivation, both of which impose strict correctness requirements. This wor...
author: Zhe Xiao, Longfei Li, Xu He, Haoying Wu, Zixing Zhang, Mingyu Liu
